name: daily-ops-cost-cost-per-foot-scope
description: Validates that cost-per-foot surfaces scope ambiguity and normalizes units before dividing.
query: What's our cost per foot on the last 5 wells?
expected_behavior: surfaces scope questions: which interval (section / job / well), which cost codes (all-in vs intangibles-only vs rig-spread), per job or per well
confirms the master unit of depth/footage and the cost currency before dividing (uses wellview_ft_to_m / the normalized Gold views)
computes cost per foot per JOB via wellview_cost_per_foot, filtered to drilling jobs
anti_behavior: must NOT divide cost by footage without confirming the master unit (the ~3.28x silent error)
must NOT sum cost across the well without grouping by job
must NOT include a shared AFE's cost twice (many-to-many allocation)
must NOT silently pick a cost-code scope
